questions.question: Describe the vanishing gradient problem in deep neural networks and explain how it can be addressed using rectified linear units (ReLUs).
Explain the concept of gradient exploding in deep neural networks and discuss the techniques used to mitigate this issue, such as gradient clipping and normalization.
What is the difference between batch normalization and data normalization in deep neural networks? Provide an example to illustrate the benefits of using batch normalization.
